story.text:
# 🔐 Privacy Layer Skills

The substrate: the lattice, the dragon, promise theory, content-addressing, the bounds. Each page is a forkable skill; fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.

## Pages

- 🌑🔒 [[Agentprivacy Amnesia Protocol]] — Foundational skill for amnesia-as-
- [[Agentprivacy Atlas Geometry]] — Atlas embeddings and exceptional Lie group geometry.
- [[Agentprivacy Compression Defence]] — Compression-as-defence principle for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- [[Agentprivacy Content Addressing]] — UOR content addressing foundation for holonic persistence.
- [[Agentprivacy Dihedral Sovereignty]] — Dihedral group foundation for dual-agent separation.
- [[Agentprivacy Disclosure Phi]] — The Phi-Adjacency Conjecture —
- [[Agentprivacy Dragon]] — Root equation and complete Privacy Value Model V6 overview for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Dragon Flight]] — Threshold activation mechanics for the dragon metaphor.
- [[Agentprivacy Edge Value]] — Edge value and trajectory dynamics for sovereignty transitions in 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Holographic Bound]] — Holographic boundary principle for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- [[Agentprivacy Knowledgegraph]] — Complete entity-relationship knowledge graph for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Network Topology]] — Network topology and stratum-weighted effects for 0xagentprivacy Privacy Pools.
- [[Agentprivacy Path Integral]] — Path integral edge value for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- [[Agentprivacy Promise Theory]] — Promise Theory foundations for 0xagentprivacy bilateral relationships.
- [[Agentprivacy Ring Algebra]] — UOR ring algebra foundation for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Temporal Dynamics]] — Temporal dynamics and memory accumulation for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Tetrahedral Sovereignty]] — Tetrahedral sovereignty model and 4×4 separation matrix for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Three Axis Separation]] — Three-axis separation model for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- [[Agentprivacy UOR Toroidal]] — UOR toroidal correspondence and manifold conjecture for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy VRC Identity]] — Verifiable Relationship Credential (VRC) identity system for 0xagentprivacy.

---
